prose:
Method provenance
Property: Atom-condensed Fukui functions (f⁺ electrophilic susceptibility, f⁻ nucleophilic susceptibility) and dual descriptor for phenol.
Level of theory: DFT, tier "standard" → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculations on the user-supplied phenol.xyz geometry (no re-optimization).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1); cation state (+1, doublet), anion state (–1, doublet).
Software: chemkit → PySCF backend (DFT module, version as in engine), fukui-reactivity skill.
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles for neutral, cation, and anion all converged; integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true. No warnings were reported (result JSON `warnings` array empty). Integrity checks (charge conservation for f⁺/f⁻, header) all passed.

Selected results (atom index is 0-based, label 1-based from input .xyz):
• Most electrophilic site (max f⁺): atom 2 (label 3, C) with f⁺ = 2.1028319.
• Most nucleophilic site (max f⁻): atom 0 (label 1, O) with f⁻ = 0.16201477.

Full arrays (13 atoms):
f⁺ = [−0.99513677, 0.39933188, 2.1028319, 1.6196806, −0.34200644, −0.28910824, 1.3079753, −0.73391779, −0.27465615, −0.91706058, −0.62991625, −0.29591677, 0.047899338]
f⁻ = [ 0.16201477, 0.048772551, 0.070972379, 0.070498539, 0.026704972, 0.020949414, 0.12351549, 0.082321145, 0.088147788, 0.081105985, 0.080487046, 0.09349577, 0.051014152]
Dual descriptor = [−1.1571515, 0.35055933, 2.0318595, 1.549182, −0.36871142, −0.31005766, 1.1844598, −0.81623893, −0.36280394, −0.99816656, −0.7104033, −0.38941254, −0.0031148145]

Reproducibility
Live log (streamed during run): `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpiybm_6x0/phenol_fukui_20260704-200257.out`
Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpiybm_6x0/live.json`
Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpiybm_6x0/live.json`

The reported Fukui indices are computed values; provenance: computed.
